content_en:
The Depth Of Hell Is The Distance It Takes For A Thrown Rock To Fail For Seventy Years

Abu Moosa Al-Ash’aree ~ related that the Messenger of Allah 2 said, “Were a stone to be thrown in Hell, it would fall for seventy years before it reached its floor.” (Related by Al-Haafiz Abu Ya’laa) In another narration, Ibn ‘Abbaas w# said, “Do you know the capacity of Hell?” Those present said, “No.” He said, “Yes, by Allah, you do not know. Between the flesh of the ear of one of them (Le. one of the dwellers of Hell) to his shoulder is the distance of 70 autumns.’ They said, ‘No.’ He said, ‘Yes, by Allah, you do not know. ‘Aishah 4 related to me that she asked the Prophet # about the saying of Allah ##:

Eg. sscah acai py Ra es AGP feces

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 527

be be Mate the pee Ake ta Be 0 bs be dh & ty 0 HK A Sy KY cee i Ge ge ag ae pee Boer oe oe 40680 1G Gol Fea oy ae age eld “Nay! When the earth is ground to powder. And your Lord comes with the angels in rows. And Hell will be brought near that Day. On that Day will man remember, but how will that remembrance (then) avail him?’ The Prophet #¢ said, “On the Day of Resurrection, Hell will be led by 70,000 bridles; each bridle will be in the hand of 70,000 angels.” He # then said, “A spark spread, and had not Allah confined it, it would have burned the heavens and the earth.” Mai’gal related from his father that the Prophet #8 said, “Heat is Hell.” (Ahmad)

The Hugeness Of Their Bodies In The Hellfire — May Allah # Protect Us From Their Situation

528 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

ASE cas OF Bo ot ox Gi US alt gp AMA eee

“Surely! Those who disbelieved in our Ayat (proofs, evidences,

signs, lessons, revelations etc.),We shall burn them in Fire. As often

as their skins are roasted through, We shall change them with other

skins that they may taste the punishment. Truly, Allah ¥@ is Ever

Most Powerful, All-Wise’") Ibn ‘Umar -# related that the Prophet 4% said, “The dwellers of the Hellfire will become large therein, to the extent that between the flesh of the ear of one of them to his shoulder is the distance of 700 years. The thickness of his skin is 70 arm-spans, and his molar tooth is like Uhud (a famous mountain in Al-Madeenah).” (Ahmad) It is authentic, and Al-Baihagee related the same.

The Ugliness Of The Disbeliever And The Hugeness OF His Body In The Fire Of Hell On The Day Of Resurrection

Abu Hurairah % related that the Messenger of Allah 2% said, “On the Day of Resurrection, the molar tooth of the disbeliever is like Uhud (famous mountain in Al-Madeenah), and the width of his skin (Le. its thickness) is seventy arm-spans. His thighs are like Warigaan. And his seat in the Hellfire is like the distance between me and ArRabdhah.” (Ahmad)

Al-Baihagee related it with the addition: “And his upper arm is like AL-Baidaa.””

Abu Hurairah 4 reported that the Messenger of Allah #€ said, “The molar tooth of the disbeliever will be like Uhud (famous mountain in Al-Madeenah); his thighs will be like Al-Baidaa; his sitting place in the Hellfire is like the distance between Qadeed and Makkah; and the thickness of his skin is 42 arm-spans of the Jabbaar.” (Ahmad)

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 529

Abu Hurairah : related that the Messenger of Allah 2% said, “Between the two shoulders of the disbeliever (in Hell) is the traveling distance of 5 days for the speedy rider.” (Related by AlHasan ibn Sufyaan)

Abu Hurairah 2 related this narration, which he ascribed to the Prophet #% “Between the two shoulders of the disbeliever in Hell is the distance of three days, for the speedy rider.” (Related by AlHasan) Al-Baihagee said, “ Al-Bukhaaree related it from... Al-Fad] ibn Moosa. And Muslim related it from... Ibn Fudail, but he did not say that Abu Hurairah # ascribed it to the Prophet #8.”

‘Amr ibn Shabeeb related from his father from his grandfather that the Prophet #% said, “On the Day of Resurrection, the haughty, arrogant ones will be raised as small ants, in the form of people. All small things will be elevated above them, until they enter a prison in Hell, which is called Boolees. The Fire of the Fires will be over them, and they will be made to drink from the sweat and puss matter of the inhabitants of Hell.” (Ahmad) At-Tirmidhee and An-Nasaaee related the same through a different chain, and At-Tirmidhee said, “Hasan,”

This means that they will be gathered in the ‘Arasaat (wide plains) of

530 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

the Day of Resurrection in that form. But then, when they are steered to the Hellfire and then enter it, their bodies will become large, as is indicated by the Ahaadeeth that we have just related; and that is a more severe punishment for them. As Allah # said: “So that they will taste the torment.”

A Mention Of The Sea Burning In Hell And Being A Part Of Hell

Safwaan ibn Ya’laa ibn Umayyah related from his father that the Prophet #i% said, “The Bahr (sea) is Hell.” Ya‘laa said, “Then he said, “Do you not see that Allah said:

“A Fire whose walls will be surrounding them (disbelievers, in the

Oneness of Allah 36)" Al-Ya'laa said, “By the One Who has my Soul in His Hand, I will never enter it until [ will be presented before Allah, and not a drop from it will afflict me until I meet Allah ‘Azza We-Jall {to Him belongs Might and Majesty).” (Ahmad) As for the hadith, “The Bahr (sea) is Hell,” it is also related by Al-Baihagee and Abu Muslim ALKujjee.” ‘Abdullah ibn ‘Amr # related that the Messenger of Allah 2% said, “Let none ride the sea except for the Huaj (one making Hajj), the Mo’tamir (one making ‘Umralt), or the one who is invading in the way of Allah, for underneath the sea is fire, and underneath the fire is sea.”

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 531

The Gates Of Hell And A Description Of Its Keepers And Its Guards - May Allah 8% Protect Us From It

BA Gk GE te Gh ee a aus ate pS Al Wes oo 0G ws tes Ga ee os pes 2 0 it ii B

“And those who disbelieved will be driven to Hell in groups till, when they reach it, the gates thereof will be opened (suddenly like a prison at the arrival of the prisoners), And its keepers will say, “Did not the Messenger come to you from yourselves, reciting to you the Verses of your Lord, and warning you of the Meeting of this Day of yours?” They will say: “Yes,” but the Word of torment has been justified against the disbelievers, It will be said (to them): “Enter you the gates of Hell, to abide therein. And (indeed) what an evil abode of the arrogant!"

And Allah % said: SRatnes oe an BS <4 fic (A

“It (Hell) has seven gates, for each of those gates is a (special) class (of sinners) assigned”

532 Book of The End: Great Triais and Tribulations

A Description Of The Siraat (Path Over Hell) And The Disparity Of Speed With Which The People Cross Over It

Abu Hurairah 2 related that the Messenger of Allah 2% said, “Indeed the Siraat is over Hell; it is slippery and unstable (for those who cross over it). The Prophets will be saying, ‘O Allah, deliver (us).’ The people (will pass over it) like the flash of lightning, like the blinking of the eye, like racing horses, like mules, like mounts, or moving on their feet. Some will (cross over) sound and safe; some will be scratched but safe; some will be thrown in it (in Hell). And it (Hell) has seven gates, for each of those gates is a (special) class (of sinners) assigned.” (Related by Al-Baihaqee)

Al-Khaleel ibn Mirrah related that the Messenger of Allah # would not sleep until he recited “Tabaarak,”” “Heameem As-Sajdah.” And he said, “The Hawaameem (Chapters beginning with Haa-Meem) are seven. And the gates of Hell are seven: Jahannam, Al-Hutamah, Ludha, Sa’eer, Sugar, Al-Haawiyah, and Al-Jaheem.” He said, “Every Ha-Meem (Chapter beginning with Ha-Meem) from it will come on the day of Resurrection (one of the narrators said, ‘I think he said’) and each one of them will stand at a gate from these gates, saying, ’O Allah, let not anyone who believed in me and recited me enter these gates.” (Related by Al-Baihaqee) Al-Baihagee then said, “This is Mungatay’ (the chain is broken). And there is uncertainty about Khaleel ibn Mirrah,’”
content_id:
Kedalaman Neraka Adalah Jarak Yang Ditempuh Oleh Sebuah Batu Yang Dilemparkan Selama Tujuh Puluh Tahun

Abu Moosa Al-Ash'aree # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah # bersabda, "Seandainya sebuah batu dilemparkan ke dalam neraka Jahannam, ia akan jatuh selama tujuh puluh tahun sebelum mencapai dasarnya." (Diriwayatkan oleh Al-Haafiz Abu Ya'laa) Dalam narasi lain, Ibn 'Abbaas # berkata, "Tahukah kalian berapa kapasitas neraka Jahannam?" Mereka yang hadir berkata, "Tidak." Ia berkata, "Ya, demi Allah, kalian tidak tahu. Antara daging telinga salah seorang dari mereka (yakni salah satu penghuni neraka) hingga bahunya adalah jarak 70 musim gugur." Mereka berkata, "Tidak." Ia berkata, "Ya, demi Allah, kalian tidak tahu. 'Aisyah # menceritakan kepadaku bahwa ia bertanya kepada Nabi # tentang firman Allah #:

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 527

"Tidak! Apabila bumi diguncangkan berturut-turut. Dan datanglah Tuhanmu; sedang malaikat berbaris-baris. Dan pada hari itu diperlihatkan neraka Jahannam. Pada hari itu ingatlah manusia, tetapi tidak berguna lagi mengingat itu baginya." Nabi # bersabda, "Pada Hari Kebangkitan, neraka Jahannam akan dituntun dengan 70.000 tali kekang; setiap tali kekang akan berada di tangan 70.000 malaikat." Beliau # kemudian bersabda, "Sebuah percikan api menyebar, dan seandainya Allah tidak membatasinya, niscaya ia akan membakar langit dan bumi." Ma'qal meriwayatkan dari ayahnya bahwa Nabi # bersabda, "Panas terik adalah (berasal dari) neraka Jahannam." (Ahmad)

Besarnya Tubuh Mereka Di Neraka Jahannam — Semoga Allah # Melindungi Kita Dari Keadaan Mereka

528 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

"Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang kafir kepada ayat-ayat Kami (bukti-bukti, keterangan-keterangan, tanda-tanda, pelajaran-pelajaran, wahyu-wahyu, dll.), Kami akan bakar mereka dengan api neraka. Setiap kali kulit mereka hangus terbakar, Kami ganti dengan kulit lain agar mereka merasakan azab. Sesungguhnya Allah Maha Kuasa lagi Maha Bijaksana." Ibn 'Umar # meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi # bersabda, "Para penghuni neraka Jahannam akan menjadi besar di dalamnya, sampai-sampai antara daging telinga salah seorang dari mereka hingga bahunya adalah jarak 700 tahun. Ketebalan kulitnya adalah 70 hasta, dan gigi gerahamnya seperti Uhud (gunung terkenal di Al-Madeenah)." (Ahmad) Ini shahih, dan Al-Baihaqee meriwayatkan hal yang sama.

Kejelekan Orang Kafir Dan Besarnya Tubuhnya Di Api Neraka Jahannam Pada Hari Kebangkitan

Abu Hurairah # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah # bersabda, "Pada Hari Kebangkitan, gigi geraham orang kafir seperti Uhud (gunung terkenal di Al-Madeenah), dan lebar kulitnya (yakni ketebalannya) adalah tujuh puluh hasta. Pahanya seperti Wariqaan. Dan tempat duduknya di neraka Jahannam seperti jarak antara aku dan Ar-Rabdhah." (Ahmad)

Al-Baihaqee meriwayatkannya dengan tambahan: "Dan lengan atasnya seperti Al-Baidaa.'"

Abu Hurairah # melaporkan bahwa Rasulullah # bersabda, "Gigi geraham orang kafir akan seperti Uhud (gunung terkenal di Al-Madeenah); pahanya akan seperti Al-Baidaa; tempat duduknya di neraka Jahannam seperti jarak antara Qadeed dan Makkah; dan ketebalan kulitnya adalah 42 hasta Jabbaar." (Ahmad)

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 529

Abu Hurairah # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah # bersabda, "Antara dua bahu orang kafir (di neraka) adalah jarak perjalanan 5 hari bagi penunggang kuda yang cepat." (Diriwayatkan oleh Al-Hasan ibn Sufyaan)

Abu Hurairah # meriwayatkan narasi ini, yang ia nisbatkan kepada Nabi # "Antara dua bahu orang kafir di neraka adalah jarak tiga hari, bagi penunggang kuda yang cepat." (Diriwayatkan oleh Al-Hasan) Al-Baihaqee berkata, "Al-Bukhaaree meriwayatkannya dari... Al-Fadhl ibn Moosa. Dan Muslim meriwayatkannya dari... Ibn Fudail, tetapi ia tidak mengatakan bahwa Abu Hurairah # menisbatkannya kepada Nabi #."

'Amr ibn Shu'aib meriwayatkan dari ayahnya dari kakeknya bahwa Nabi # bersabda, "Pada Hari Kebangkitan, orang-orang yang sombong dan angkuh akan dibangkitkan seperti semut-semut kecil, dalam bentuk manusia. Semua hal kecil akan ditinggikan di atas mereka, hingga mereka masuk ke sebuah penjara di neraka, yang disebut Boolees. Api dari segala api akan berada di atas mereka, dan mereka akan diberi minum dari keringat dan nanah penghuni neraka." (Ahmad) At-Tirmidhee dan An-Nasaaee meriwayatkan hal yang sama melalui sanad yang berbeda, dan At-Tirmidhee berkata, "Hasan."

Ini berarti bahwa mereka akan dikumpulkan di 'Arasaat (dataran luas) Hari Kebangkitan dalam bentuk itu. Tetapi kemudian, ketika mereka digiring ke neraka Jahannam dan kemudian memasukinya, tubuh mereka akan menjadi besar, sebagaimana ditunjukkan oleh hadith-hadith yang baru kami sebutkan; dan itu adalah hukuman yang lebih berat bagi mereka. Sebagaimana Allah # berfirman: "Agar mereka merasakan azab."

530 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

Penyebutan Laut Yang Akan Terbakar Di Neraka Dan Menjadi Bagian Dari Neraka

Shafwaan ibn Ya'laa ibn Umayyah meriwayatkan dari ayahnya bahwa Nabi # bersabda, "Al-Bahr (laut) adalah neraka Jahannam." Ya'laa berkata, "Kemudian ia berkata, 'Tidakkah engkau melihat bahwa Allah berfirman: 'Api yang dindingnya mengelilingi mereka (orang-orang kafir akan keesaan Allah).' Al-Ya'laa berkata, 'Demi Dzat Yang memiliki jiwaku, aku tidak akan pernah memasukinya sampai aku dihadapkan kepada Allah, dan setetes pun darinya tidak akan menimpaku sampai aku bertemu Allah 'Azza wa Jall (bagi-Nya segala kemuliaan dan keagungan).'" (Ahmad) Adapun hadith, "Al-Bahr (laut) adalah neraka Jahannam," juga diriwayatkan oleh Al-Baihaqee dan Abu Muslim Al-Kujjee." 'Abdullah ibn 'Amr # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah # bersabda, "Janganlah ada yang mengarungi laut kecuali orang yang menunaikan Haji, orang yang berumrah, atau orang yang berjihad di jalan Allah, karena di bawah laut ada api, dan di bawah api ada laut."

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 531

Pintu-Pintu Neraka Jahannam Dan Gambaran Para Penjaganya — Semoga Allah # Melindungi Kita Darinya

"Dan orang-orang kafir digiring ke neraka Jahannam secara berkelompok, hingga apabila mereka sampai ke neraka itu, pintu-pintunya dibuka (tiba-tiba seperti penjara di hadapan para terpidana yang baru datang). Dan para penjaganya berkata kepada mereka: 'Bukankah telah datang kepada kalian rasul-rasul dari kalangan kalian sendiri, yang membacakan kepada kalian ayat-ayat Tuhan kalian dan memperingatkan kalian tentang pertemuan dengan hari ini?' Mereka menjawab: 'Benar.' Tetapi ketetapan azab telah berlaku bagi orang-orang kafir. Dikatakan kepada mereka: 'Masuklah kalian ke pintu-pintu neraka Jahannam itu, untuk tinggal di dalamnya. Maka itulah seburuk-buruk tempat bagi orang-orang yang menyombongkan diri!'"

Dan Allah # berfirman: "Neraka Jahannam itu mempunyai tujuh pintu. Tiap-tiap pintu (telah ditetapkan) untuk golongan yang tertentu dari mereka."

532 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

Gambaran Siraat (Jembatan Di Atas Neraka) Dan Perbedaan Kecepatan Orang-Orang Yang Menyeberanginya

Abu Hurairah # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah # bersabda, "Sesungguhnya Siraat berada di atas neraka Jahannam; ia licin dan tidak stabil (bagi mereka yang menyeberanginya). Para Nabi akan berkata, 'Ya Allah, selamatkanlah (kami).' Orang-orang (akan menyeberanginya) seperti kilat, seperti kedipan mata, seperti kuda pacu, seperti bagal, seperti tunggangan, atau berjalan dengan kaki mereka. Sebagian akan (menyeberangi dengan) selamat dan aman; sebagian akan tergores tetapi selamat; sebagian akan dilemparkan ke dalamnya (ke neraka). Dan neraka itu memiliki tujuh pintu, untuk setiap pintu telah ditetapkan satu golongan tertentu." (Diriwayatkan oleh Al-Baihaqee)

Al-Khaleel ibn Mirrah meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah # tidak tidur sampai ia membaca "Tabaaraak," "Haa-Meem As-Sajdah." Dan ia berkata, "Hawaameem (surah-surah yang dimulai dengan Haa-Meem) berjumlah tujuh. Dan pintu-pintu neraka juga tujuh: Jahannam, Al-Hutamah, Ludha, Sa'eer, Saqar, Al-Haawiyah, dan Al-Jaheem." Ia berkata, "Setiap Haa-Meem (Surah yang dimulai dengan Haa-Meem) darinya akan datang pada hari Kebangkitan (salah seorang perawi berkata, 'Aku kira ia berkata') dan masing-masingnya akan berdiri di salah satu pintu dari pintu-pintu ini, seraya berkata, 'Ya Allah, janganlah siapapun yang beriman kepadaku dan membacaku memasuki pintu-pintu ini.'" (Diriwayatkan oleh Al-Baihaqee) Al-Baihaqee kemudian berkata, "Ini Munqathi' (sanadnya terputus). Dan ada keraguan tentang Khaleel ibn Mirrah.'"

And الله % said: SRatnes oe an BS <4 fic (A “It (النار) has seven gates, for each of those gates is a (special) class (of sinners) assigned” 532 الكتاب of The End: Great Triais and Tribulations A Description Of The Siraat (الطريق Over النار) And The Disparity Of Speed With Which The People Cross Over It أبو هريرة 2 related that الرسول ﷺ of الله 2% said, “Indeed the Siraat is over النار; it is slippery and unstable (for those who cross over it). The الأنبياء will be saying, ‘O الله, deliver (us).’ The people (will pass over it) like the flash of lightning, like the blinking of the eye, like racing horses, like mules, like mounts, or moving on their feet. Some will (cross over) sound and safe; some will be scratched but safe; some will be thrown in it (in النار). And it (النار) has seven gates, for each of those gates is a (special) class (of sinners) assigned.” (Related by Al-Baihaqee) Al-Khaleel ibn Mirrah related that الرسول ﷺ of الله # would not sleep حتى he recited “Tabaarak,”” “Heameem As-السجدة.” And قال, “The Hawaameem (الأبواب beginning with Haa-Meem) are seven. And the gates of النار are seven: جهنم, Al-Hutamah, Ludha, Sa’eer, Sugar, Al-Haawiyah, and Al-Jaheem.” قال, “Every Ha-Meem (الباب beginning with Ha-Meem) from it will come on the day of البعث (one of the narrators said, ‘I think قال’) and each one of them will stand at a gate from these gates, saying, ’O الله, let not anyone who believed in me and recited me enter these gates.” (Related by Al-Baihaqee) Al-Baihagee then said, “This is Mungatay’ (the chain is broken). And there is uncertainty about Khaleel ibn Mirrah,’”
